creator: p-fbsd-bugs@ziemba.us
text:
Created attachment 249742
ports/UPDATING notes for misc/amanda-server update to 3.5.1

The update from amanda 3.3.9 to 3.5.1 introduced a few issues, the most severe of which was that amdump silently looped forever trying to create a file in a directory it wasn't permitted to write to.

To spare others the annoyance of debugging these issues, I offer some new text for UPDATING (attached).
